# Video API Cost

> Video API Cost helps developers estimate and compare public AI video generation API prices before building or scaling a product.

Pricing data is manually collected from public provider pricing pages and normalized to USD per output second. Calculators compare provider prices at the same selected output resolution whenever possible.

The default Seedance 2 scenario is 1,000 videos per month at 8 seconds per video. The recommended default comparison uses 720p rows so provider estimates are compared fairly.

Monthly cost formula: `videos per month × seconds per video × provider price per output second`.

Pricing estimates are not billing guarantees. Verify pricing, availability, model mode, and resolution on the linked provider page before production use.

Provider rankings are price-only comparisons based on the selected resolution. Referral links, where used, do not affect pricing data, calculations, or ranking.

This file provides concise site context for inference-time use. It does not grant permission to train on site content or override crawler controls. Automated systems should also follow the site's robots.txt and applicable terms.

## Core pages

- [Video API Cost homepage](https://videoapicost.com/): Overview of the site's AI video API cost estimation tools.
- [Video Generation API Pricing](https://videoapicost.com/video-generation-api-pricing): AI video API pricing hub for text-to-video, image-to-video, billing units, and model-level pricing pages.
- [Seedance 2 API Cost Per Second](https://videoapicost.com/seedance-2-api-cost-per-second): Reference page for Seedance 2 listed public 720p prices normalized to USD per output second, including formula examples and source notes.
- [Seedance 2 Pricing Calculator](https://videoapicost.com/seedance-2-pricing-calculator): Compares BytePlus official Seedance 2 estimates with public pricing across fal.ai, PiAPI, OpenRouter, EvoLink, and Kie.ai, with filters for output resolution, monthly video volume, and video duration.
- [Seedance 2.5 API Pricing Tracker](https://videoapicost.com/seedance-2-5-pricing): Tracks official and provider pricing publication status while confirmed Seedance 2.5 API pricing is unavailable.

## Pricing methodology

- [Seedance 2 default comparison](https://videoapicost.com/seedance-2-pricing-calculator#default-comparison-title): Server-rendered comparison using 1,000 eight-second videos at 720p.
- [Seedance 2 pricing methodology](https://videoapicost.com/seedance-2-pricing-calculator#methodology-title): Explains manual collection, normalization, resolution matching, calculation, and verification guidance.
- [Seedance 2 provider sources](https://videoapicost.com/seedance-2-pricing-calculator#sources-title): Links to public provider pages used for the listed pricing estimates.

## Optional

- [XML sitemap](https://videoapicost.com/sitemap.xml): Complete list of indexable site pages.
- [Robots policy](https://videoapicost.com/robots.txt): Crawler access directives and sitemap location.
